name: UN ECOSOC 1945 (UN Economic and Social Council under UN Charter Chapter X)
summary: The United Nations Economic and Social Council (ECOSOC) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-UN-Charter-Chapter-X framework established by the UN Charter — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-economic-social-coordination framework + UN-System-wide-coordination framework for 70%+ of UN System human and financial resources framework (ECOSOC established 24 October 1945 by UN Charter Chapter X Article 61 framework + ECOSOC operations began 1946 + ECOSOC composition 54 members elected by UNGA for 3-year terms framework — formal foundational ECOSOC framework establishing comprehensive ECOSOC organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-economic-social-coordination framework + UN-System-wide-coordination framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 14+ UN Functional Commissions framework: CSW + CND + CCPCJ + UNFF + UNPFII + Statistical + Population + Sustainable Development + Science and Technology + Social Development + Drugs + Women + Indigenous Peoples + Crime framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5 UN Regional Economic Commissions framework: ECA + ECE + ECLAC + ESCAP + ESCWA framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 14 UN Specialized Agencies coordination framework: WHO + ILO + FAO + UNESCO + WIPO + IMF + World Bank + IBRD + IDA + IFC + MIGA + ICAO + IMO + ITU + WMO + UPU + IFAD + UNIDO + UNWTO + WTO framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal NGOs Consultative Status framework via Resolution 1996/31 framework + ~6,500 NGOs in consultative status framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal High-Level Political Forum HLPF 2013 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal HLPF + SDGs review framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Voluntary National Reviews VNRs framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Financing for Development FfD 2002-2015-2024-2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal ECOSOC + UN Functional Commissions framework (ECOSOC + 14+ UN Functional Commissions providing formal sectoral framework: Commission on the Status of Women CSW + Commission on Narcotic Drugs CND + Commission on Crime Prevention and Criminal Justice CCPCJ + UN Forum on Forests UNFF + UN Permanent Forum on Indigenous Issues UNPFII + Statistical Commission + Commission on Population and Development + Commission on Sustainable Development + Commission on Science and Technology for Development + Commission for Social Development framework — formal foundational ECOSOC + Functional Commissions framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal 14+ UN Functional Commissions framework), as the central jurisdiction of the formal ECOSOC NGOs Consultative Status framework (ECOSOC Resolution 1996/31 framework providing formal NGOs Consultative Status framework: General + Special + Roster consultative-status framework — formal foundational ECOSOC NGOs Consultative Status framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal NGOs Consultative Status framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal ~6,500 NGOs in consultative status framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal civil-society-formal-engagement framework via NGOs Consultative Status framework), and as the central jurisdiction of the formal High-Level Political Forum HLPF 2013 + SDGs review framework (HLPF established 2013 by UNGA Resolution 67/290 replacing Commission on Sustainable Development + HLPF meets annually under ECOSOC auspices + quadrennially under UNGA auspices providing formal SDGs review framework via Voluntary National Reviews VNRs — formal foundational HLPF + SDGs review framework, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational framework operating formal HLPF + SDGs review framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Voluntary National Reviews VNRs framework). The ECOSOC is operating upon 54 ECOSOC member states + 193 UN member states framework — comprehensive universal coverage framework. The Council is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal ECOSOC + Commission on the Status of Women CSW + UN Permanent Forum on Indigenous Issues UNPFII framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal CSW gender-equality framework + UNPFII Indigenous Peoples cross-border-family-rights framework + ECOSOC NGOs Consultative Status framework allowing PA-survivors-organizations consultative engagement framework. The ECOSOC President + ECOSOC Bureau + 14+ UN Functional Commissions + 5 UN Regional Economic Commissions + HLPF are the formal ECOSOC bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The ECOSOC is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.citation: UN Charter Chapter X Articles 61-72 (ECOSOC Framework)
statutory_framework.title: UN Charter Chapter X Articles 61-72
statutory_framework.relevance: UN Charter Chapter X Articles 61-72 framework on ECOSOC: composition + functions + powers + voting + procedure framework — formal foundational ECOSOC framework.

statutory_framework.title: ECOSOC Resolution 1996/31
statutory_framework.relevance: ECOSOC Resolution 1996/31 of 25 July 1996 on Consultative Relationship between the United Nations and Non-Governmental Organizations — formal foundational ECOSOC NGOs Consultative Status framework.

statutory_framework.title: UNGA Resolution 67/290 HLPF
statutory_framework.relevance: UNGA Resolution 67/290 of 9 July 2013 establishing High-Level Political Forum on Sustainable Development HLPF — formal foundational HLPF framework.

statutory_framework.title: Addis Ababa Action Agenda FfD3
statutory_framework.relevance: Addis Ababa Action Agenda FfD3 adopted 16 July 2015 at Third International Conference on Financing for Development Addis Ababa Ethiopia — formal foundational Financing for Development framework.

statutory_framework.title: Compromiso de Sevilla FfD4
statutory_framework.relevance: Compromiso de Sevilla adopted 3 July 2025 at Fourth International Conference on Financing for Development Sevilla Spain — formal foundational FfD4 framework.

apex_courts.name: UN ECOSOC
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for ECOSOC — composed of 54 members elected by UNGA for 3-year terms.

apex_courts.name: ECOSOC President
apex_courts.role: Formal ECOSOC President body — elected for 1-year term.

apex_courts.name: 14+ UN Functional Commissions
apex_courts.role: Formal ECOSOC Functional Commissions: CSW Commission on the Status of Women + CND Commission on Narcotic Drugs + CCPCJ Commission on Crime Prevention and Criminal Justice + UN Forum on Forests UNFF + UN Permanent Forum on Indigenous Issues UNPFII + Statistical Commission + Commission on Population and Development + Commission on Sustainable Development + Commission on Science and Technology for Development + Commission for Social Development + others.

apex_courts.name: 5 UN Regional Economic Commissions
apex_courts.role: Formal 5 UN Regional Economic Commissions: ECA Economic Commission for Africa Addis Ababa + ECE Economic Commission for Europe Geneva + ECLAC Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean Santiago + ESCAP Economic and Social Commission for Asia and the Pacific Bangkok + ESCWA Economic and Social Commission for Western Asia Beirut.

apex_courts.name: High-Level Political Forum (HLPF)
apex_courts.role: Formal HLPF body established 2013 by UNGA Resolution 67/290 replacing Commission on Sustainable Development.

professional_regulators.name: UN Department of Economic and Social Affairs DESA

anonymisation_convention: ECOSOC-related communications operate via state-state framework via ECOSOC + Functional Commissions; individual communications limited under ECOSOC framework + NGOs Consultative Status framework allowing civil-society-formal-engagement.

key_developments.title: ECOSOC established + UN Charter
key_developments.description: UN Charter signed 26 June 1945 in San Francisco + effective 24 October 1945 + ECOSOC established 24 October 1945 by UN Charter Chapter X Article 61 — formal foundational ECOSOC framework operational.

key_developments.title: First ECOSOC Session + 14 UN Specialized Agencies framework
key_developments.description: First ECOSOC Session held 23 January 1946 in London + 14 UN Specialized Agencies framework operational — formal foundational ECOSOC + Specialized Agencies framework operational.

key_developments.title: 5 UN Regional Economic Commissions established
key_developments.description: ECA + ECE + ECLAC + ESCAP + ESCWA UN Regional Economic Commissions established 1947-1973 — formal foundational 5 UN Regional Economic Commissions framework operational.

key_developments.title: UN Charter Article 61 amendment ECOSOC expansion 18 to 27 members
key_developments.description: UN Charter Article 61 amendment effective 31 August 1965 + ECOSOC expansion 18 to 27 members framework — formal ECOSOC expansion framework operational.

key_developments.title: UN Charter Article 61 second amendment ECOSOC expansion 27 to 54 members
key_developments.description: UN Charter Article 61 second amendment effective 24 September 1973 + ECOSOC expansion 27 to 54 members framework — formal ECOSOC second expansion framework operational.

key_developments.title: ECOSOC Resolution 1996/31 NGOs Consultative Status
key_developments.description: ECOSOC Resolution 1996/31 of 25 July 1996 on Consultative Relationship between the United Nations and Non-Governmental Organizations — formal foundational ECOSOC NGOs Consultative Status framework operational.

key_developments.title: MDGs + ECOSOC Annual Ministerial Review AMR
key_developments.description: Millennium Development Goals MDGs adopted 8 September 2000 + ECOSOC Annual Ministerial Review AMR established + Development Cooperation Forum DCF — formal ECOSOC MDGs framework operational.

key_developments.title: FfD1 Monterrey Consensus
key_developments.description: Monterrey Consensus adopted 22 March 2002 at International Conference on Financing for Development Monterrey Mexico — formal foundational FfD framework operational.

key_developments.title: HLPF established
key_developments.description: HLPF established 9 July 2013 by UNGA Resolution 67/290 replacing Commission on Sustainable Development — formal foundational HLPF framework operational.

key_developments.title: SDGs adopted + Addis Ababa Action Agenda FfD3
key_developments.description: Sustainable Development Goals SDGs adopted 25 September 2015 + Addis Ababa Action Agenda FfD3 adopted 16 July 2015 — formal foundational SDGs + FfD3 framework operational.

key_developments.title: Compromiso de Sevilla FfD4 + UN80 Reform Process
key_developments.description: Compromiso de Sevilla adopted 3 July 2025 at FfD4 Sevilla Spain + UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework — formal foundational FfD4 + UN80 Reform framework operational.

structural_findings: ECOSOC operates a supranational global framework — places ECOSOC in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-economic-social-coordination framework + UN-System-wide-coordination framework for 70%+ of UN System human and financial resources framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-economic-social-coordination framework + UN-System-wide-coordination framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 14+ UN Functional Commissions framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5 UN Regional Economic Commissions framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 14 UN Specialized Agencies coordination framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal NGOs Consultative Status framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal ~6,500 NGOs in consultative status framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal HLPF 2013 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal HLPF + SDGs review framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Voluntary National Reviews VNRs framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Financing for Development FfD 2002-2015-2024-2025 framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal ECOSOC + UN Functional Commissions framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal 14+ UN Functional Commissions framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal ECOSOC NGOs Consultative Status framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal NGOs Consultative Status framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal ~6,500 NGOs in consultative status framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal civil-society-formal-engagement framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal HLPF 2013 + SDGs review framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational framework operating formal HLPF + SDGs review framework + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Voluntary National Reviews VNRs framework.
54 ECOSOC member state + 193 UN member state ratification framework is structurally distinctive globally — comprehensive universal coverage framework.

1945 ECOSOC + 1946 first session + 1947 Regional Commissions + 1965 ECOSOC 18-to-27 expansion + 1971 27-to-54 expansion + 1996 NGOs Consultative Status + 2000 MDGs + AMR + DCF + 2002 FfD1 Monterrey + 2013 HLPF + 2015 SDGs + Addis Ababa FfD3 + 2025 Sevilla FfD4 + UN80 ECOSOC-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

ECOSOC + 14+ Functional Commissions + 5 Regional Economic Commissions + 14 UN Specialized Agencies + NGOs Consultative Status + HLPF + FfD formal septet framework with formal CSW gender-equality framework + UNPFII Indigenous Peoples cross-border-family-rights framework + ECOSOC NGOs Consultative Status PA-survivors-organizations-consultative-engagement PA-intersection framework.

sources.title: UN ECOSOC
sources.publisher: UN Department of Economic and Social Affairs DESA

Only modern global supranational framework operating on formal international-economic-social-coordination framework + UN-System-wide-coordination for 70%+ of UN System human and financial resources + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 14+ UN Functional Commissions + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 5 UN Regional Economic Commissions: ECA Addis Ababa + ECE Geneva + ECLAC Santiago + ESCAP Bangkok + ESCWA Beirut + only modern global supranational framework operating formal 14 UN Specialized Agencies coordination + only modern global supranational framework operating formal NGOs Consultative Status Resolution 1996/31 + ~6,500 NGOs in consultative status + only modern global supranational framework operating formal HLPF 2013 + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Voluntary National Reviews VNRs + only modern global supranational framework operating formal Financing for Development FfD 2002 Monterrey + 2008 Doha + 2015 Addis Ababa + 2025 Sevilla + only modern global supranational framework operating formal UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 + central jurisdiction of formal 14+ Functional Commissions + central jurisdiction of formal NGOs Consultative Status civil-society-formal-engagement + central jurisdiction of formal HLPF + SDGs review + 54 ECOSOC member states + 193 UN member states + ECOSOC Headquartered New York + Geneva + 1945 ECOSOC + 1946 first session + 1947 Regional Commissions + 1965 ECOSOC 18-to-27 expansion + 1971 27-to-54 expansion + 1996 NGOs Consultative Status + 2000 MDGs + AMR + DCF + 2002 FfD1 Monterrey + 2013 HLPF + 2015 SDGs + Addis Ababa FfD3 + 2025 Sevilla FfD4 + UN80 ECOSOC-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: ECOSOC + CSW + UNPFII framework operates substantial intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal CSW gender-equality framework + UNPFII Indigenous Peoples cross-border-family-rights framework + ECOSOC NGOs Consultative Status framework allowing PA-survivors-organizations consultative engagement framework.
